response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq, which aligns with the role's MCP and agentic workflow focus. However, the resume lacks demonstrated depth in production GenAI delivery: no explicit RAG, vector database, LLM evaluation, or multi-agent framework (LangGraph/CrewAI) experience is shown, and cloud experience is limited to AWS CDK at Optilyz rather than broad GenAI cloud architecture. Staff-level customer-facing technical discovery leadership is not clearly evidenced either. Worth a screening call to probe the depth of the recent AI-agent work.
strengths: 15+ years shipping production systems across web, backend, and embedded
Recent hands-on work with MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, mentoring, public workshops and talks
concerns: No explicit RAG, vector database, or LLM evaluation/observability experience listed
Limited evidence of multi-cloud GenAI architecture (AWS CDK only, no GCP/Azure)
Customer-facing technical discovery and forward-deployed consulting experience not demonstrated

key_factors.factor: MCP and agentic workflow experience at re:cinq
Missing RAG / vector DB / LLM evaluation expertise
